Package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api

Class VirtualFurnaceAPI

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.VirtualFurnaceAPI
public class VirtualFurnaceAPI extends Object
Main API for VirtualFurnace

  • Constructor Details

    • VirtualFurnaceAPI

      public VirtualFurnaceAPI(JavaPlugin javaPlugin)
      Create a new instance of the VirtualFurnaceAPI
      Parameters:
      javaPlugin - Your plugin

    • VirtualFurnaceAPI

      public VirtualFurnaceAPI(@NotNull @NotNull JavaPlugin javaPlugin, boolean disableMetrics)
      Create a new instance of the VirtualFurnaceAPI

      If you plan on using bStats metrics in your plugin, disable the bStats metrics for the API to prevent conflict.

      Parameters:
      javaPlugin - Your plugin
      disableMetrics - Disable metrics for VirtualFurnaceAPI (If you are using metrics in your own plugin)

  • Method Details

    • disableAPI

      public void disableAPI()
      Disable the API

      Stops ticking, saves all furnaces and tiles to file. This should be used in a plugin's onDisable() method

    • disableFurnaceTick

      public void disableFurnaceTick()
      Disable the furnace tick

      This is good to use in your onDisable() method, to prevent tasks still running on server shutdown/reload

    • getInstance

      public static VirtualFurnaceAPI getInstance()
      Get a static instance of the VirtualFurnaceAPI

      NOTE: You have to create once first or this will return null

      Returns:
      Instance of the VirtualFurnaceAPI

    • getJavaPlugin

      public JavaPlugin getJavaPlugin()
      Get the plugin that was passed into this instance
      Returns:
      Plugin in this instance

    • isEnabled

      public boolean isEnabled()
      Check whether or not the API is enabled
      Returns:
      True if enabled, false if failed to initialize
